message.content:
I have many issues to report:

## issue
demo controller should allow pausing demo and going backward even when in demo:test mode.  when in demo:manual mode, it should allow initiating autopilot mode.  rename "demo:test" to "demo:autopilot."

## issue
step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"

## issue
mobile search window size doesn't match width of content; there's a white bar

## issue
[3/16] Add Filters  FAIL  Filter dropdown  (select)

## issue
[11/16] About Page  FAIL  Section heading  (h2)


## issue
pausing interaction in manual mode results in an exit after timeout:
$ pnpm demo:manual

> kapow-web@0.0.1 demo:manual /home/ketan/project/kapow/web
> npx tsx demo/run.ts --manual


🎬 College Power Search Demo
   Mode: manual (click to advance)
   Browser: chromium
   Steps: 16

  [1/16] Welcome
  PASS  Hero heading
  PASS  Search input
  PASS  Site header
Demo failed: page.waitForFunction: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
    at waitForAdvance (/home/ketan/project/kapow/web/demo/overlay.ts:96:16)
    at main (/home/ketan/project/kapow/web/demo/run.ts:137:17) {
  name: 'TimeoutError'
}
 ELIFECYCLE  Command failed with exit code 1.


## issue
the default map view is very narrow.  it should be wider.  also, it should be a toggle rather than a completely separate view, so it should be available on the card, list, and table views.  it should be at the top above the facets and search results.  we'll have to do something else for mobile.

## issue
when I click on a pin in the map view, the map is displayed overlapping the card for the institution.


## issue
demo search should be by something that matches multiple universities not just one ("Stanford")


## issue
clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford"


## issue
search button on homepage is still nearly invisible (white text, gray background; black background on hover)

## issue
remove city from facet display

## issue
remove latitude/longitude from facet list

## issue
radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.

## issue
carousel cards' width leads to the right border on the third card being cut off in the default display

## issue
the free text field should connect via webmcp to browser chat.  if there's no browser chat, we should have a built-in claude API integration that connects to the mcp server.

## issue
the list view should have a few more useful pieces of information on it.  aim for 5.   propose candidates, and we'll come up with candidates.

## issue
the default card view only shows the name and location.  we need more.  aim for about 10 useful pieces of information including the 5 above for the list view; propose candidates, and we'll figure it out.

## issue
the search sorts alphabetically by default (example search ("state").  I don't know what's most useful; we should think about it.  if we have a location for the user, we should sort by distance.

## issue
"region" should be multi-select in the faceted search.

## issue
all search facets that are multiple choice should be by default sorted alphabetically ("region" is not).

## issue
"region" should not include "US Service Schools" - that is not a geographical region.

## issue
we should have a field to search by which ROTC programs a university has.

## issue
clicking on a card in the card view pops up an expanded result card with no data in it.  we want to show many more fields, and we want to have actual data in place.


## issue
"find similar schools" is very slow

## issue
after seeing results for "find similar schools" the user should have an appropriately titled button that allows them to expand the search via the main search page.

## issue
when I click similar schools, then see a different institution, the similar schools list loads on that card as well without showing the button or requiring me to click it.  it should not be active until I activate it, but then it should stay active just for that school.

## issue
there's no way to get rid of similar schools once I've made them visible.

## issue
each card should have navigation that allows me to go to the next result or previous result (if available) without leaving the card view.

## issue
the card view shows the institution name twice at the top.

## issue
"graduate enrollment" shouldn't be a searchable facet.

## issue
the "gender" facet should be labeled "coeducational enrollment" or something like that

## issue
"room and board" shouldn't be a searchable facet

## issue
every facet label has two tooltips next to it, one for a description and one for a citation.  the description should be displayed when hovering over the label.  the citation should be a tooltip but choose a more informative icon than just the circle+i.

## issue
some of the facet field tooltip descriptions include something like (NCES: x_y_z).  remove that.

## issue
the "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with.

## issue
"partisan direction" and "partisan score" should be combined into a single widget that has a slider from R to D.  this slider should be color coded red on the R end and blue on the D end.  there should be two points on the slider indicating the top and bottom of the range with a default of including the entire range.

## issue
application platforms should be more extensive and include the university of California application, applytexas, applysuny, and other similar, state-specific shared application methods.

## issue
all of the koppen fields should be multiselect.  they should not have "Koppen" in the labels, but it's okay for it to appear in the tooltip.  "Climate Group" label should just be "Climate," and the other two fields should not have "Subtype" in the label.

## issue
"total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields.  allowed values should be by 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 than 2500 increments above that, with an "unlimited" at the high end.  apply the same thing to cost fields.

## issue
the "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

## issue
every facet group should be collapsible.  if a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

## issue
every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

## issue
the custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend).  the user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend.  this does not modify the search results until the user indicates completion.

## issue
we need sort options on the list and card view.  that needs a design.

## issue
the table view needs to show many more columns by default.  a horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.


## issue
in the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number.  it should be the descriptive word.

## issue
it appears that many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima.  that appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from pima community college to arizona state.  this is not desired behavior; we need to investigate and fix.  it's probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those.

## issue
the PDF export looks terrible.  it has all the columns squeezed so narrow that the text is stretched out vertically and unreadable.  also it has white text on a dark blue background that is ugly.  the formatting needs to be much better.  if there are many columns, we should split horizontally across successive pages; if so, we always want the leftmost two columns to be the institution name and location.

## issue
the pdf "koppen temperature subtype" in the pdf export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

## issue
clicking the PDF export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header"

content.thinking: The user has reported many issues. Let me create beads issues for all of them. First, let me check the beads tool and understand the current state of issues.

content.text: That's a lot of issues! Let me create them all in beads. First, let me check the current state.

bd --help 2>&1 | head -30
input.description: Check beads help for create syntax

content.content: No issues found.

toolUseResult.stdout: No issues found.

content.content:
Issues chained together like beads. A lightweight issue tracker with first-class dependency support.

Usage:
  bd [flags]
  bd [command]

Working With Issues:
  children        List child beads of a parent
  close           Close one or more issues
  comments        View or manage comments on an issue
  create          Create a new issue (or multiple issues from markdown file)
  create-form     Create a new issue using an interactive form
  delete          Delete one or more issues and clean up references
  edit            Edit an issue field in $EDITOR
  gate            Manage async coordination gates
  label           Manage issue labels
  list            List issues
  merge-slot      Manage merge-slot gates for serialized conflict resolution
  move            Move an issue to a different rig with dependency remapping
  promote         Promote a wisp to a permanent bead
  q               Quick capture: create issue and output only ID
  query           Query issues using a simple query language
  refile          Move an issue to a different rig
  reopen          Reopen one or more closed issues
  search          Search issues by text query
  set-state       Set operational state (creates event + updates label)
  show            Show issue details
  state           Query the current value of a state dimension
  todo            Manage TODO items (convenience wrapper for task issues)
  update          Update one or more issues

input.command: bd create --help 2>&1 | head -40

content.content:
Create a new issue (or multiple issues from markdown file)

Usage:
  bd create [title] [flags]

Aliases:
  create, new

Flags:
      --acceptance string       Acceptance criteria
      --agent-rig string        Agent's rig name (requires --type=agent)
      --append-notes string     Append to existing notes (with newline separator)
  -a, --assignee string         Assignee
      --body-file string        Read description from file (use - for stdin)
      --defer string            Defer until date (issue hidden from bd ready until then). Same formats as --due
      --deps strings            Dependencies in format 'type:id' or 'id' (e.g., 'discovered-from:bd-20,blocks:bd-15' or 'bd-20')
  -d, --description string      Issue description
      --design string           Design notes
      --dry-run                 Preview what would be created without actually creating
      --due string              Due date/time. Formats: +6h, +1d, +2w, tomorrow, next monday, 2025-01-15
      --ephemeral               Create as ephemeral (short-lived, subject to TTL compaction)
  -e, --estimate int            Time estimate in minutes (e.g., 60 for 1 hour)
      --event-actor string      Entity URI who caused this event (requires --type=event)
      --event-category string   Event category (e.g., patrol.muted, agent.started) (requires --type=event)
      --event-payload string    Event-specific JSON data (requires --type=event)
      --event-target string     Entity URI or bead ID affected (requires --type=event)
      --external-ref string     External reference (e.g., 'gh-9', 'jira-ABC')
  -f, --file string             Create multiple issues from markdown file
      --force                   Force creation even if prefix doesn't match database prefix
  -h, --help                    help for create
      --id string               Explicit issue ID (e.g., 'bd-42' for partitioning)
  -l, --labels strings          Labels (comma-separated)
      --metadata string         Set custom metadata (JSON string or @file.json to read from file)
      --mol-type string         Molecule type: swarm (multi-polecat), patrol (recurring ops), work (default)
      --no-inherit-labels       Don't inherit labels from parent issue
      --notes string            Additional notes
      --parent string           Parent issue ID for hierarchical child (e.g., 'bd-a3f8e9')
      --prefix string           Create issue in rig by prefix (e.g., --prefix bd- or --prefix bd or --prefix beads)
  -p, --priority string         Priority (0-4 or P0-P4, 0=highest) (default "2")
      --repo string             Target repository for issue (overrides auto-routing)

content.text: Let me create all the issues using a markdown file for batch creation.

input.content:
# Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller should allow pausing and going backward even in demo:test (autopilot) mode. In demo:manual mode, it should allow initiating autopilot mode. Rename "demo:test" to "demo:autopilot."

---

# Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header" assertion.

---

# Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Mobile search window size doesn't match width of content; there's a white bar visible.

---

# Demo: step 3/16 Add Filters fails on filter dropdown select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

[3/16] Add Filters FAIL Filter dropdown (select)

---

# Demo: step 11/16 About Page fails on section heading h2
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

[11/16] About Page FAIL Section heading (h2)

---

# Demo: manual mode exits after timeout when pausing interaction
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Pausing interaction in manual mode results in an exit after 30s timeout. The waitForAdvance function throws TimeoutError. Manual mode should wait indefinitely for user interaction.

---

# Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, enhancement

The default map view is very narrow. It should be wider. Also, it should be a toggle rather than a completely separate view, so it should be available on the card, list, and table views. It should be at the top above the facets and search results. Mobile needs a different treatment.

---

# Map view: pin click causes map to overlap institution card
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, bug

When clicking on a pin in the map view, the map is displayed overlapping the card for the institution.

---

# Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo search should be by something that matches multiple universities not just one ("Stanford").

---

# Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford" (or whatever the search term is).

---

# Search button on homepage nearly invisible
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Search button on homepage is still nearly invisible (white text, gray background; black background on hover). Needs better contrast/visibility.

---

# Remove city from facet display
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove city from the facet display list.

---

# Remove latitude/longitude from facet list
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.

---

# Radius facet should be below location and conditional on location value
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.

---

# Carousel cards: right border on third card is cut off
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

Carousel cards' width leads to the right border on the third card being cut off in the default display.

---

# Free text field: connect via WebMCP to browser chat or built-in Claude API
- Priority: 3
- Labels: feature, ai

The free text field should connect via WebMCP to browser chat. If there's no browser chat, we should have a built-in Claude API integration that connects to the MCP server.

---

# List view: show more useful information (aim for 5 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The list view should have a few more useful pieces of information on it. Aim for 5 fields. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

# Card view: show more information (aim for 10 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The default card view only shows the name and location. Need more — aim for about 10 useful pieces of information including the 5 from the list view. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

# Search: default sort order needs design (distance if location available)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The search sorts alphabetically by default (example: searching "state"). If we have a location for the user, we should sort by distance. Default sort order needs design thinking.

---

# Search: region facet should be multi-select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Region" should be multi-select in the faceted search.

---

# Search: multiple-choice facets should be sorted alphabetically by default
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All search facets that are multiple choice should be sorted alphabetically by default. Currently "region" is not sorted alphabetically.

---

# Search: region should not include "US Service Schools"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data

"Region" should not include "US Service Schools" — that is not a geographical region.

---

# Search: add ROTC programs field
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, feature

We should have a field to search by which ROTC programs a university has.

---

# Detail card: expanded result card shows no data
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Clicking on a card in the card view pops up an expanded result card with no data in it. We want to show many more fields and have actual data in place.

---

# Similar schools: very slow performance
- Priority: 2
- Labels: performance, bug

"Find similar schools" is very slow.

---

# Similar schools: add button to expand search via main search page
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

After seeing results for "find similar schools" the user should have an appropriately titled button that allows them to expand the search via the main search page.

---

# Similar schools: loads on other cards without activation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

When clicking similar schools then viewing a different institution, the similar schools list loads on that card as well without showing the button or requiring a click. It should not be active until activated, but then stay active just for that school.

---

# Similar schools: no way to dismiss once visible
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

There's no way to get rid of similar schools once they've been made visible.

---

# Detail card: add next/previous result navigation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Each card should have navigation that allows going to the next or previous result (if available) without leaving the card view.

---

# Detail card: institution name shown twice at top
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

The card view shows the institution name twice at the top.

---

# Search: remove "graduate enrollment" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Graduate enrollment" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

# Search: rename "gender" facet to "coeducational enrollment" or similar
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The "gender" facet should be labeled "coeducational enrollment" or something like that.

---

# Search: remove "room and board" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Room and board" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

# Facets: consolidate description/citation tooltips
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet label has two tooltips next to it, one for a description and one for a citation. The description should be displayed when hovering over the label. The citation should be a tooltip but with a more informative icon than just the circle+i.

---

# Facets: remove NCES reference from tooltip descriptions
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Some of the facet field tooltip descriptions include something like (NCES: x_y_z). Remove that.

---

# Search: "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with
- Priority: 1
- Labels: search, bug

The "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with. It's non-functional.

---

# Facets: combine partisan direction and score into R-to-D color-coded slider
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Partisan direction" and "partisan score" should be combined into a single widget with a slider from R to D. Color coded red on R end and blue on D end. Two points on the slider for range top/bottom with default including the entire range.

---

# Search: expand application platforms to include UC, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, etc.
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data, enhancement

Application platforms should be more extensive and include the University of California application, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, and other similar state-specific shared application methods.

---

# Facets: clean up Koppen climate field labels and make multiselect
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All Koppen fields should be multiselect. They should not have "Koppen" in the labels (okay in tooltip). "Climate Group" label should just be "Climate," and the other two fields should not have "Subtype" in the label.

---

# Facets: enrollment/cost min-max should be dropdowns with increment steps
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

# Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

# Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

# Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

# Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

# Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

# Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

# Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

# Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

# PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

---

# PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

# PDF export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the PDF export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

toolUseResult.content:
# Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller should allow pausing and going backward even in demo:test (autopilot) mode. In demo:manual mode, it should allow initiating autopilot mode. Rename "demo:test" to "demo:autopilot."

---

# Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header" assertion.

---

# Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Mobile search window size doesn't match width of content; there's a white bar visible.

---

# Demo: step 3/16 Add Filters fails on filter dropdown select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

[3/16] Add Filters FAIL Filter dropdown (select)

---

# Demo: step 11/16 About Page fails on section heading h2
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

[11/16] About Page FAIL Section heading (h2)

---

# Demo: manual mode exits after timeout when pausing interaction
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Pausing interaction in manual mode results in an exit after 30s timeout. The waitForAdvance function throws TimeoutError. Manual mode should wait indefinitely for user interaction.

---

# Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, enhancement

The default map view is very narrow. It should be wider. Also, it should be a toggle rather than a completely separate view, so it should be available on the card, list, and table views. It should be at the top above the facets and search results. Mobile needs a different treatment.

---

# Map view: pin click causes map to overlap institution card
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, bug

When clicking on a pin in the map view, the map is displayed overlapping the card for the institution.

---

# Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo search should be by something that matches multiple universities not just one ("Stanford").

---

# Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford" (or whatever the search term is).

---

# Search button on homepage nearly invisible
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Search button on homepage is still nearly invisible (white text, gray background; black background on hover). Needs better contrast/visibility.

---

# Remove city from facet display
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove city from the facet display list.

---

# Remove latitude/longitude from facet list
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.

---

# Radius facet should be below location and conditional on location value
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.

---

# Carousel cards: right border on third card is cut off
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

Carousel cards' width leads to the right border on the third card being cut off in the default display.

---

# Free text field: connect via WebMCP to browser chat or built-in Claude API
- Priority: 3
- Labels: feature, ai

The free text field should connect via WebMCP to browser chat. If there's no browser chat, we should have a built-in Claude API integration that connects to the MCP server.

---

# List view: show more useful information (aim for 5 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The list view should have a few more useful pieces of information on it. Aim for 5 fields. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

# Card view: show more information (aim for 10 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The default card view only shows the name and location. Need more — aim for about 10 useful pieces of information including the 5 from the list view. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

# Search: default sort order needs design (distance if location available)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The search sorts alphabetically by default (example: searching "state"). If we have a location for the user, we should sort by distance. Default sort order needs design thinking.

---

# Search: region facet should be multi-select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Region" should be multi-select in the faceted search.

---

# Search: multiple-choice facets should be sorted alphabetically by default
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All search facets that are multiple choice should be sorted alphabetically by default. Currently "region" is not sorted alphabetically.

---

# Search: region should not include "US Service Schools"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data

"Region" should not include "US Service Schools" — that is not a geographical region.

---

# Search: add ROTC programs field
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, feature

We should have a field to search by which ROTC programs a university has.

---

# Detail card: expanded result card shows no data
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Clicking on a card in the card view pops up an expanded result card with no data in it. We want to show many more fields and have actual data in place.

---

# Similar schools: very slow performance
- Priority: 2
- Labels: performance, bug

"Find similar schools" is very slow.

---

# Similar schools: add button to expand search via main search page
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

After seeing results for "find similar schools" the user should have an appropriately titled button that allows them to expand the search via the main search page.

---

# Similar schools: loads on other cards without activation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

When clicking similar schools then viewing a different institution, the similar schools list loads on that card as well without showing the button or requiring a click. It should not be active until activated, but then stay active just for that school.

---

# Similar schools: no way to dismiss once visible
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

There's no way to get rid of similar schools once they've been made visible.

---

# Detail card: add next/previous result navigation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Each card should have navigation that allows going to the next or previous result (if available) without leaving the card view.

---

# Detail card: institution name shown twice at top
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

The card view shows the institution name twice at the top.

---

# Search: remove "graduate enrollment" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Graduate enrollment" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

# Search: rename "gender" facet to "coeducational enrollment" or similar
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The "gender" facet should be labeled "coeducational enrollment" or something like that.

---

# Search: remove "room and board" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Room and board" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

# Facets: consolidate description/citation tooltips
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet label has two tooltips next to it, one for a description and one for a citation. The description should be displayed when hovering over the label. The citation should be a tooltip but with a more informative icon than just the circle+i.

---

# Facets: remove NCES reference from tooltip descriptions
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Some of the facet field tooltip descriptions include something like (NCES: x_y_z). Remove that.

---

# Search: "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with
- Priority: 1
- Labels: search, bug

The "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with. It's non-functional.

---

# Facets: combine partisan direction and score into R-to-D color-coded slider
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Partisan direction" and "partisan score" should be combined into a single widget with a slider from R to D. Color coded red on R end and blue on D end. Two points on the slider for range top/bottom with default including the entire range.

---

# Search: expand application platforms to include UC, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, etc.
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data, enhancement

Application platforms should be more extensive and include the University of California application, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, and other similar state-specific shared application methods.

---

# Facets: clean up Koppen climate field labels and make multiselect
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All Koppen fields should be multiselect. They should not have "Koppen" in the labels (okay in tooltip). "Climate Group" label should just be "Climate," and the other two fields should not have "Subtype" in the label.

---

# Facets: enrollment/cost min-max should be dropdowns with increment steps
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

# Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

# Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

# Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

# Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

# Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

# Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

# Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

# Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

# PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

---

# PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

# PDF export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the PDF export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

   356→

   362→- Priority: 2

   364→

file.content:
## Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller should allow pausing and going backward even in demo:test (autopilot) mode. In demo:manual mode, it should allow initiating autopilot mode. Rename "demo:test" to "demo:autopilot."

---

## Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header" assertion.

---

## Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Mobile search window size doesn't match width of content; there's a white bar visible.

---

## Demo: step 3/16 Add Filters fails on filter dropdown select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

[3/16] Add Filters FAIL Filter dropdown (select)

---

## Demo: step 11/16 About Page fails on section heading h2
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

[11/16] About Page FAIL Section heading (h2)

---

## Demo: manual mode exits after timeout when pausing interaction
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Pausing interaction in manual mode results in an exit after 30s timeout. The waitForAdvance function throws TimeoutError. Manual mode should wait indefinitely for user interaction.

---

## Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, enhancement

The default map view is very narrow. It should be wider. Also, it should be a toggle rather than a completely separate view, so it should be available on the card, list, and table views. It should be at the top above the facets and search results. Mobile needs a different treatment.

---

## Map view: pin click causes map to overlap institution card
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, bug

When clicking on a pin in the map view, the map is displayed overlapping the card for the institution.

---

## Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo search should be by something that matches multiple universities not just one ("Stanford").

---

## Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford" (or whatever the search term is).

---

## Search button on homepage nearly invisible
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Search button on homepage is still nearly invisible (white text, gray background; black background on hover). Needs better contrast/visibility.

---

## Remove city from facet display
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove city from the facet display list.

---

## Remove latitude/longitude from facet list
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.

---

## Radius facet should be below location and conditional on location value
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.

---

## Carousel cards: right border on third card is cut off
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

Carousel cards' width leads to the right border on the third card being cut off in the default display.

---

## Free text field: connect via WebMCP to browser chat or built-in Claude API
- Priority: 3
- Labels: feature, ai

The free text field should connect via WebMCP to browser chat. If there's no browser chat, we should have a built-in Claude API integration that connects to the MCP server.

---

## List view: show more useful information (aim for 5 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The list view should have a few more useful pieces of information on it. Aim for 5 fields. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

## Card view: show more information (aim for 10 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The default card view only shows the name and location. Need more — aim for about 10 useful pieces of information including the 5 from the list view. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

## Search: default sort order needs design (distance if location available)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The search sorts alphabetically by default (example: searching "state"). If we have a location for the user, we should sort by distance. Default sort order needs design thinking.

---

## Search: region facet should be multi-select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Region" should be multi-select in the faceted search.

---

## Search: multiple-choice facets should be sorted alphabetically by default
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All search facets that are multiple choice should be sorted alphabetically by default. Currently "region" is not sorted alphabetically.

---

## Search: region should not include "US Service Schools"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data

"Region" should not include "US Service Schools" — that is not a geographical region.

---

## Search: add ROTC programs field
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, feature

We should have a field to search by which ROTC programs a university has.

---

## Detail card: expanded result card shows no data
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Clicking on a card in the card view pops up an expanded result card with no data in it. We want to show many more fields and have actual data in place.

---

## Similar schools: very slow performance
- Priority: 2
- Labels: performance, bug

"Find similar schools" is very slow.

---

## Similar schools: add button to expand search via main search page
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

After seeing results for "find similar schools" the user should have an appropriately titled button that allows them to expand the search via the main search page.

---

## Similar schools: loads on other cards without activation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

When clicking similar schools then viewing a different institution, the similar schools list loads on that card as well without showing the button or requiring a click. It should not be active until activated, but then stay active just for that school.

---

## Similar schools: no way to dismiss once visible
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

There's no way to get rid of similar schools once they've been made visible.

---

## Detail card: add next/previous result navigation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Each card should have navigation that allows going to the next or previous result (if available) without leaving the card view.

---

## Detail card: institution name shown twice at top
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

The card view shows the institution name twice at the top.

---

## Search: remove "graduate enrollment" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Graduate enrollment" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Search: rename "gender" facet to "coeducational enrollment" or similar
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The "gender" facet should be labeled "coeducational enrollment" or something like that.

---

## Search: remove "room and board" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Room and board" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Facets: consolidate description/citation tooltips
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet label has two tooltips next to it, one for a description and one for a citation. The description should be displayed when hovering over the label. The citation should be a tooltip but with a more informative icon than just the circle+i.

---

## Facets: remove NCES reference from tooltip descriptions
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Some of the facet field tooltip descriptions include something like (NCES: x_y_z). Remove that.

---

## Search: "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with
- Priority: 1
- Labels: search, bug

The "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with. It's non-functional.

---

## Facets: combine partisan direction and score into R-to-D color-coded slider
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Partisan direction" and "partisan score" should be combined into a single widget with a slider from R to D. Color coded red on R end and blue on D end. Two points on the slider for range top/bottom with default including the entire range.

---

## Search: expand application platforms to include UC, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, etc.
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data, enhancement

Application platforms should be more extensive and include the University of California application, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, and other similar state-specific shared application methods.

---

## Facets: clean up Koppen climate field labels and make multiselect
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All Koppen fields should be multiselect. They should not have "Koppen" in the labels (okay in tooltip). "Climate Group" label should just be "Climate," and the other two fields should not have "Subtype" in the label.

---

## Facets: enrollment/cost min-max should be dropdowns with increment steps
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

## Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

## Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

## Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

## Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

## Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

## Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

## Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

## Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

## PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

---

## PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

## csv export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the csv export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

content.text:
I see your edit — changed the last issue from "PDF export" to "csv export." 

Let's go through them one by one. Here's **issue 1 of 51**:

---

**Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls**
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

> Demo controller should allow pausing and going backward even in demo:test (autopilot) mode. In demo:manual mode, it should allow initiating autopilot mode. Rename "demo:test" to "demo:autopilot."

**Questions:**
1. When paused in autopilot mode, should the overlay show play/back/forward controls? Or just a "Resume" button?
2. For going backward — should it fully re-execute the previous step (undo the current state and replay), or just show the previous step's overlay/description?
3. In manual mode, should "start autopilot" just resume auto-advancing from the current step, or restart from the beginning?

Anything you'd like to change, add, or clarify before we lock this one in?

message.content: 1) include play, back, and forward controls.  2) going backward should not fully reexecute; just go back to the previous state/view.  3) start autopilot should continue from the current point not restart.  risk: what if the user interacted with the page and changed something?  is there a good way to restore the desired state without a full replay?  or at least detect breaking deviations?

content.thinking:
The user is asking about risk mitigation for the demo controller. Let me think about this and provide a thoughtful response before updating the issue.

For the state restoration question - this is a real concern. Options:
1. Snapshot DOM/URL state at each step and compare before advancing
2. Simply re-navigate to the expected URL and re-apply the step's setup actions
3. Each step could have a "precondition check" that validates the page is in the expected state, and if not, do a minimal restoration (e.g., navigate to the right URL, clear filters, etc.)
4. Accept that backward navigation is "best effort" and just show a warning if state seems wrong


5. I should examine the existing demo code to understand how it's structured and what patterns are already in place before recommending a specific approach.

content.text: Good question on the state risk. Let me look at how the demo steps are structured to give a grounded answer.

input.prompt:
Look at the demo system in web/demo/. I need to understand:
1. How steps are defined (web/demo/steps.ts) - what does each step contain? Does it have setup/navigation actions, or just assertions?
2. How run.ts executes steps - does it rely on sequential state buildup, or can steps be executed independently?
3. How overlay.ts works - what controls does it show?

Focus on whether steps have any "setup" or "navigate" actions that could be used to restore state, vs. relying on the previous step's side effects.

content.text:
Perfect. Now I have a complete picture. Let me compile my findings:

## Summary: Demo System Analysis

### 1. **How Steps Are Defined** (`web/demo/steps.ts`)

Each step is a `DemoStep` object containing:
- **`title`** and **`description`** — Display text for the overlay
- **`action(page: Page)`** — An async function that **performs both navigation AND side effects**
  - Some steps explicitly navigate with `await page.goto(path, { waitUntil: 'networkidle' })`
  - Others perform actions on the already-current page (type, click, scroll)
  - All state changes from previous steps carry over unless explicitly reset
- **`expect?`** — Optional array of `ElementCheck` objects (selector + label) for verification via `verify()`

**Key observation**: Steps are **NOT idempotent**. Steps contain **NO explicit setup/restore code**. They assume previous state is present.

Examples:
- Step 2 (Quick Search) assumes Step 1 left the home page loaded, then types "Stanford" into the search input
- Step 3 (Add Filters) assumes Step 2's typed query is still there, then modifies dropdowns
- Step 8 (Ranking Blend) explicitly does `page.goto('/search', ...)` to navigate to a fresh state
- Step 15 (Tablet Search) uses `page.goto('/search?q=Stanford&state=CA', ...)` — a direct URL jump bypassing earlier steps

---

### 2. **How `run.ts` Executes Steps**

Execution flow:
1. **Sequential iteration**: `for (let i = startIndex; i < steps.length; i++)`
2. **Run action**: `await step.action(page)` — each step mutates page state
3. **Verify**: If `step.expect` exists, call `verify(page, step.expect)` to check selectors are visible
4. **Show overlay**: Inject demo panel and display title/description
5. **Wait for advance**: Either auto-advance after `pauseMs` or wait for manual button click
6. **Next step runs on the mutated page state**

**Critical**: Steps **rely on sequential state buildup** from previous steps. There is **NO mechanism to restore state between steps**.

Starting from `--step=N` (e.g., `--step=8`) means:
- Steps 1–7 never run
- Step 8 starts fresh with a clean page (new browser context/page instance)
- This will **fail** if Step 8 assumes prior setup (e.g., if it expected the search page to already be loaded with results)

**Exceptions** (steps that reset state):
- Steps explicitly calling `page.goto()` with a fresh path
- Steps changing viewport size (e.g., Step 14 "Tablet View" calls `page.setViewportSize()` then `page.goto('/')`)

---

### 3. **How `overlay.ts` Works**

The overlay is a **fixed-position panel** (bottom-right, `z-index: 99999`) injected via `page.evaluate()`.

**Controls displayed**:
- **Progress bar**: Visual progress with `Step X of Y` label and percentage
- **Title and description**: From the current step
- **Advance button** (manual mode): `Next Step ›` button styled with gold (`#c9a227`)
- **Countdown bar** (auto mode): Visual timer showing time until auto-advance

**Key implementation details**:
- Overlay is **re-injected on every step** because navigations destroy injected DOM: `document.getElementById('demo-overlay')?.remove()`
- Manual mode: Sets `window.__demoAdvance = false`, button click sets it to `true`, then `waitForAdvance()` polls for that flag
- Auto mode: Uses CSS animation (`transition:width ...ms linear`) to animate countdown bar from 100% to 0% over `pauseMs`

**Visibility**: The panel itself does not provide any way to skip steps, restart, or navigate arbitrarily — it only shows progress and triggers advance-on-click (manual) or timeout (auto).

---

### **Critical Insight**: State Restoration Opportunities

**No built-in setup/restore.** Each step:
1. Either explicitly navigates with `page.goto()` to a fresh/known state
2. Or assumes the previous step's mutations persist

To make steps independently runnable, you would need to:
- Add explicit `setup()` phase to each step that brings the page to the required precondition
- Or refactor steps to be stateless (e.g., each action includes its own "reset to home → navigate to results page → interact")

Current design is a **linear walkthrough** expecting sequential execution.

Good findings. Here's the situation:

**Steps are a linear chain** — most rely on the previous step's side effects (e.g., step 3 assumes step 2's search text is still in the input). However, some steps do a fresh `page.goto()` and are effectively self-contained.

**Practical options for state restoration:**

1. **Snapshot URLs + key state per step**: After each step completes, record the current URL and a few key selectors/values. When going backward, navigate to the saved URL. This handles steps that are URL-driven (most navigation steps) but won't restore typed text or dropdown selections.

2. **Add a `setup()` function to each step**: Each step declares how to reach its precondition state independently (e.g., "go to `/search?q=Stanford&state=CA`"). This is the robust approach but requires refactoring all 16 steps.

3. **Best-effort with deviation detection**: Before advancing (forward or backward), check that the current page URL/state matches what's expected. If it doesn't, show a warning overlay: "Page state changed — results may differ. [Restart from here] [Continue anyway]".

**My recommendation**: Option 2 (add `setup()` per step) is the cleanest long-term, and option 3 (deviation detection) is a good safety net on top of it. Option 1 is fragile.

**Updated description for the issue:**

> Demo controller changes:
> - Rename `demo:test` to `demo:autopilot`
> - Overlay shows play/pause, back, and forward controls in all modes
> - In manual mode, add "Start Autopilot" button that continues from current step
> - Going backward shows the previous step's state without full replay
> - Each step gets a `setup()` function that can independently establish its precondition state (URL + key interactions), enabling non-sequential navigation
> - Add deviation detection: before advancing, verify page state matches expectations; if not, show warning with option to re-run setup or continue anyway

Does that capture it well? Anything to adjust before we move to issue 2?

message.content: option 2 and option 3 are acceptable.  do those and let's continue.

- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller should allow pausing and going backward even in demo:test (autopilot) mode. In demo:manual mode, it should allow initiating autopilot mode. Rename "demo:test" to "demo:autopilot."

---

[11/16] About Page FAIL Section heading (h2)

## Demo: manual mode exits after timeout when pausing interaction
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Pausing interaction in manual mode results in an exit after 30s timeout. The waitForAdvance function throws TimeoutError. Manual mode should wait indefinitely for user interaction.

---

## Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, enhancement

The default map view is very narrow. It should be wider. Also, it should be a toggle rather than a completely separate view, so it should be available on the card, list, and table views. It should be at the top above the facets and search results. Mobile needs a different treatment.

---

## Map view: pin click causes map to overlap institution card
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, bug

When clicking on a pin in the map view, the map is displayed overlapping the card for the institution.

---

## Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo search should be by something that matches multiple universities not just one ("Stanford").

---

## Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford" (or whatever the search term is).

---

## Search button on homepage nearly invisible
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Search button on homepage is still nearly invisible (white text, gray background; black background on hover). Needs better contrast/visibility.

---

## Remove city from facet display
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove city from the facet display list.

---

## Remove latitude/longitude from facet list
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.

---

## Radius facet should be below location and conditional on location value
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.

---

## Carousel cards: right border on third card is cut off
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

Carousel cards' width leads to the right border on the third card being cut off in the default display.

---

## Free text field: connect via WebMCP to browser chat or built-in Claude API
- Priority: 3
- Labels: feature, ai

The free text field should connect via WebMCP to browser chat. If there's no browser chat, we should have a built-in Claude API integration that connects to the MCP server.

---

## List view: show more useful information (aim for 5 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The list view should have a few more useful pieces of information on it. Aim for 5 fields. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

## Card view: show more information (aim for 10 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The default card view only shows the name and location. Need more — aim for about 10 useful pieces of information including the 5 from the list view. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

## Search: default sort order needs design (distance if location available)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The search sorts alphabetically by default (example: searching "state"). If we have a location for the user, we should sort by distance. Default sort order needs design thinking.

---

## Search: region facet should be multi-select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Region" should be multi-select in the faceted search.

---

## Search: multiple-choice facets should be sorted alphabetically by default
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All search facets that are multiple choice should be sorted alphabetically by default. Currently "region" is not sorted alphabetically.

---

## Search: region should not include "US Service Schools"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data

"Region" should not include "US Service Schools" — that is not a geographical region.

---

## Search: add ROTC programs field
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, feature

We should have a field to search by which ROTC programs a university has.

---

## Detail card: expanded result card shows no data
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Clicking on a card in the card view pops up an expanded result card with no data in it. We want to show many more fields and have actual data in place.

---

## Similar schools: very slow performance
- Priority: 2
- Labels: performance, bug

"Find similar schools" is very slow.

---

## Similar schools: add button to expand search via main search page
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

After seeing results for "find similar schools" the user should have an appropriately titled button that allows them to expand the search via the main search page.

---

## Similar schools: loads on other cards without activation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

When clicking similar schools then viewing a different institution, the similar schools list loads on that card as well without showing the button or requiring a click. It should not be active until activated, but then stay active just for that school.

---

## Similar schools: no way to dismiss once visible
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

There's no way to get rid of similar schools once they've been made visible.

---

## Detail card: add next/previous result navigation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Each card should have navigation that allows going to the next or previous result (if available) without leaving the card view.

---

## Detail card: institution name shown twice at top
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

The card view shows the institution name twice at the top.

---

## Search: remove "graduate enrollment" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Graduate enrollment" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Search: rename "gender" facet to "coeducational enrollment" or similar
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The "gender" facet should be labeled "coeducational enrollment" or something like that.

---

## Search: remove "room and board" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Room and board" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Facets: consolidate description/citation tooltips
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet label has two tooltips next to it, one for a description and one for a citation. The description should be displayed when hovering over the label. The citation should be a tooltip but with a more informative icon than just the circle+i.

---

## Facets: remove NCES reference from tooltip descriptions
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Some of the facet field tooltip descriptions include something like (NCES: x_y_z). Remove that.

---

## Search: "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with
- Priority: 1
- Labels: search, bug

The "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with. It's non-functional.

---

## Facets: combine partisan direction and score into R-to-D color-coded slider
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Partisan direction" and "partisan score" should be combined into a single widget with a slider from R to D. Color coded red on R end and blue on D end. Two points on the slider for range top/bottom with default including the entire range.

---

## Search: expand application platforms to include UC, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, etc.
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data, enhancement

Application platforms should be more extensive and include the University of California application, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, and other similar state-specific shared application methods.

---

## Facets: clean up Koppen climate field labels and make multiselect
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All Koppen fields should be multiselect. They should not have "Koppen" in the labels (okay in tooltip). "Climate Group" label should just be "Climate," and the other two fields should not have "Subtype" in the label.

---

## Facets: enrollment/cost min-max should be dropdowns with increment steps
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

## Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

## Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

## Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

## Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

## Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

## Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

## Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

## Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

## PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

---

## PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

## csv export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the csv export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

lines: -Demo controller should allow pausing and going backward even in demo:test (autopilot) mode. In demo:manual mode, it should allow initiating autopilot mode. Rename "demo:test" to "demo:autopilot."
+- Overlay shows play/pause, back, and forward controls in all modes
+- In manual mode, add "Start Autopilot" button that continues from current step
+- Going backward shows the previous step's state without full replay
+- Each step gets a `setup()` function that can independently establish its precondition state (URL + key interactions), enabling non-sequential navigation
+- Add deviation detection: before advancing, verify page state matches expectations; if not, show warning with option to re-run setup or continue anyway

content.text:
OK so there is a `<header>` element. The failure is probably a timing/visibility issue at 375px width. This seems like a straightforward investigation bug — the element exists but the assertion may be failing due to viewport-specific rendering timing.

**Updated description:**

> Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

Sound right, or do you want to adjust anything?

- Priority: 2

- Priority: 2

If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

- Priority: 1

Clicking the csv export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

lines: -Step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header" assertion.

+Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

content.text:
**Issue 3 of 51:**

---

**Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width**
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

> Mobile search window size doesn't match width of content; there's a white bar visible.

**Questions:**
1. Is this the white bar on the right side of the screenshot you just showed me? I can see the content doesn't quite fill the full width.
2. Is this a demo-only issue (viewport size mismatch) or a real CSS bug in the app's mobile layout?

message.content: 1) no, not the same screenshot.  2) could be a demo-only issue.  when I resize manually, I don't see the same problem.

content.text:
So likely the demo's `page.setViewportSize({ width: 375, height: 812 })` creates a viewport that doesn't match how the app responds to a real mobile browser resize. The app's responsive CSS may depend on something the Playwright viewport doesn't trigger (e.g., `window.innerWidth` vs CSS media queries, or a missing `<meta name="viewport">` interaction).

**Updated description:**

> Mobile search window shows a white bar (content doesn't fill full width) during demo mobile steps. Not reproducible with manual browser resize — likely a Playwright `page.setViewportSize()` issue where the viewport doesn't trigger the same responsive behavior as a real mobile browser. Investigate whether the demo needs additional viewport setup (e.g., device emulation instead of raw viewport size) or if the app CSS has an edge case at exactly 375px.

Good?

message.content: good

## Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
