---

## Facets: enrollment/cost min-max should be dropdowns with increment steps
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

## Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

## Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

## Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

## Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

## Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

## Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

## Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

## Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

## PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

---

## PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

## csv export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the csv export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

lines: +Step 3/16 (Add Filters) fails the "Filter dropdown" assertion with selector `select`. Needs investigation — may be a selector mismatch if filter dropdowns were changed from native `<select>` elements to Mantine components, or a timing issue.

content.text:
**Issue 5 of 51:**

---

**Demo: step 11/16 About Page fails on section heading h2**
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

> [11/16] About Page FAIL Section heading (h2)

Same situation — do you have any additional context, or should I treat this the same way (investigate selector mismatch)?

message.content: same issue.  I have a browser running right now, so you can give me instructions for this issue and the previous one for how to get to the same state and what to look for manually.

content.text:
For **issue 4 (step 3 - Add Filters)**:

1. Go to the search page: `http://localhost:8080/search`
2. Open browser DevTools (F12), go to Elements tab
3. Look at the filter sidebar — search the DOM for any `<select>` elements
4. If there are none, the filters are likely Mantine components (`<input>`, `<div role="combobox">`, etc.) and the demo's `select` selector is stale

For **issue 5 (step 11 - About Page)**:

1. Go to: `http://localhost:8080/about`
2. In DevTools Elements tab, search for `h2` tags
3. If there are no `<h2>` elements, the page headings may use `<h1>` or `<h3>` instead, or Mantine `Title` with a different `order` prop

In both cases, note what the actual element/tag is so we can update the demo selectors to match.

message.content:
issue 4: I drilled into the locale selector at document.querySelector("#root > div > main > div > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(5) > div:nth-child(3) > label > select"), and it has this HTML: issue 5: I found an

at document.querySelector("#root > div > main > section:nth-child(3) > div > h2")

Our Mission

content.text:
Interesting — so both elements actually exist in the DOM. These are likely timing issues rather than missing selectors.

For issue 4, the `<select>` is there but it's nested deep in the filter sidebar which may not be visible/rendered when the assertion runs (filters might be collapsed or still loading).

For issue 5, the `<h2>` exists but it's in a `<section>` that might not be scrolled into view or rendered in time.

Let me update both issues with this info.

The `<select>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — it's the locale selector for City/Suburb/Town/Rural). Likely a timing or visibility issue — the filter sidebar may not be fully rendered or visible when `verify()` checks. Investigate whether the step's action needs to wait for filter panel to be visible before asserting.

## Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller changes:
- Rename `demo:test` to `demo:autopilot`
- Overlay shows play/pause, back, and forward controls in all modes
- In manual mode, add "Start Autopilot" button that continues from current step
- Going backward shows the previous step's state without full replay
- Each step gets a `setup()` function that can independently establish its precondition state (URL + key interactions), enabling non-sequential navigation
- Add deviation detection: before advancing, verify page state matches expectations; if not, show warning with option to re-run setup or continue anyway

---

## Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

---

## Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Mobile search window shows a white bar (content doesn't fill full width) during demo mobile steps. Not reproducible with manual browser resize — likely a Playwright `page.setViewportSize()` issue where the viewport doesn't trigger the same responsive behavior as a real mobile browser. Investigate whether the demo needs additional viewport setup (e.g., device emulation instead of raw viewport size) or if the app CSS has an edge case at exactly 375px.

---

## Demo: step 3/16 Add Filters fails on filter dropdown select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

This one seems straightforward — `waitForAdvance()` in `overlay.ts` uses `page.waitForFunction` with a 30s timeout. In manual mode it should use `timeout: 0` (no timeout). Anything to add or is this good as-is?

message.content: switching from autopilot to manual mode should change the timeout to 0.  switching from manual mode to autopilot should set the timeout to 30s.  these timeouts should be expressed as contants in the source code rather than inline literals.

Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

## Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width

Mobile search window shows a white bar (content doesn't fill full width) during demo mobile steps. lines: -Pausing interaction in manual mode results in an exit after 30s timeout. The waitForAdvance function throws TimeoutError. Manual mode should wait indefinitely for user interaction.
+Manual mode exits after 30s because `waitForAdvance()` uses a hardcoded 30s timeout in `page.waitForFunction`. Fix:

content.text:
**Issue 7 of 51:**

---

**Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results**
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, enhancement

> The default map view is very narrow. It should be wider. Also, it should be a toggle rather than a completely separate view, so it should be available on the card, list, and table views. It should be at the top above the facets and search results. Mobile needs a different treatment.

This is a significant design change. A few questions:

1. **Width**: Full width of the results area? Or a specific proportion (e.g., 100% of the content area above results)?
2. **Height**: Fixed height (e.g., 300px, 400px)? Or user-resizable?
3. **Toggle**: A button in the view switcher toolbar (alongside card/list/table/map icons)? The current map icon would become a toggle rather than a separate view mode?
4. **Mobile**: Collapse behind a "Show Map" button? Or omit entirely on small screens?
5. **Interaction with results**: When a user hovers over a result card, should the corresponding map pin highlight (and vice versa)?

message.content: 1) we want the map to be as wide as possible without looking terrible.  start with 100% minus a small amount of padding.  2) user resizable but ideally by default responsive to the viewport so the user can still see useful information below the map and it's got nice proportions.  3) yes, the map is a toggle.  the button would be offset from the card/list/table button set to make it clear it's something else.  4/5) on airbnb, using a mobile width browser viewport still shows a map.  the results are in a page element below.  we should be able to scroll through that without losing the map.  also, if the user clicks on a result, the card view should fully cover the list of results.  we should highlight the active result on the map via pin color.  active could be we're in the individual result view or the mouse is hovering over that result.  if the user hovers over a pin, we should highlight the individual result if it's in a card/list/table view.  I don't know if we should scroll to that point or not in order to make sure it's visible.  try it, and if I don't like it, I'll change it.

content.text: Great detail. Let me capture all of that.

input.old_string: The default map view is very narrow. It should be wider. Also, it should be a toggle rather than a completely separate view, so it should be available on the card, list, and table views. It should be at the top above the facets and search results. Mobile needs a different treatment.
input.new_string:
Redesign map as a toggle overlay that works with any result view (card/list/table):

**Layout:**
- Map sits above facets and search results, full width minus small padding
- Height is responsive to viewport by default — user should still see useful content below. User-resizable.
- Map toggle button is in the toolbar but visually offset from the card/list/table view switcher to make it clear it's a different kind of control

**Result/map interaction:**
- Hovering over a result highlights the corresponding pin (color change)
- Viewing an individual result card highlights the pin
- Hovering over a pin highlights the corresponding result in the card/list/table view below
- When hovering a pin, scroll the results to make the highlighted result visible (try this; may revert if UX feels wrong)

**Mobile (Airbnb-style):**
- Map stays visible at top even on mobile viewport
- Results are in a scrollable area below the map — scrolling results does not hide the map
- Clicking a result opens card view that fully covers the results list (but not the map)
- Active result highlighted on map via pin color

Also, it should be a toggle rather than a completely separate view, so it should be available on the card, list, and table views. It should be at the top above the facets and search results. Mobile needs a different treatment.

Redesign map as a toggle overlay that works with any result view (card/list/table):

**Layout:**
- Map sits above facets and search results, full width minus small padding
- Height is responsive to viewport by default — user should still see useful content below. User-resizable.
- Map toggle button is in the toolbar but visually offset from the card/list/table view switcher to make it clear it's a different kind of control

**Result/map interaction:**
- Hovering over a result highlights the corresponding pin (color change)
- Viewing an individual result card highlights the pin
- Hovering over a pin highlights the corresponding result in the card/list/table view below
- When hovering a pin, scroll the results to make the highlighted result visible (try this; may revert if UX feels wrong)

**Mobile (Airbnb-style):**
- Map stays visible at top even on mobile viewport
- Results are in a scrollable area below the map — scrolling results does not hide the map
- Clicking a result opens card view that fully covers the results list (but not the map)
- Active result highlighted on map via pin color

---

## Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford" (or whatever the search term is).

---

## Search button on homepage nearly invisible
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Search button on homepage is still nearly invisible (white text, gray background; black background on hover). Needs better contrast/visibility.

---

## Remove city from facet display
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove city from the facet display list.

---

## Remove latitude/longitude from facet list
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.

---

## Radius facet should be below location and conditional on location value
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.

---

- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

Carousel cards' width leads to the right border on the third card being cut off in the default display.

---

## Free text field: connect via WebMCP to browser chat or built-in Claude API
- Priority: 3
- Labels: feature, ai

The free text field should connect via WebMCP to browser chat. If there's no browser chat, we should have a built-in Claude API integration that connects to the MCP server.

---

## List view: show more useful information (aim for 5 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The list view should have a few more useful pieces of information on it. Aim for 5 fields. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

## Card view: show more information (aim for 10 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The default card view only shows the name and location. Need more — aim for about 10 useful pieces of information including the 5 from the list view. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

## Search: default sort order needs design (distance if location available)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The search sorts alphabetically by default (example: searching "state"). If we have a location for the user, we should sort by distance. Default sort order needs design thinking.

---

## Search: region facet should be multi-select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Region" should be multi-select in the faceted search.

---

## Search: multiple-choice facets should be sorted alphabetically by default
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All search facets that are multiple choice should be sorted alphabetically by default. Currently "region" is not sorted alphabetically.

---

## Search: region should not include "US Service Schools"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data

"Region" should not include "US Service Schools" — that is not a geographical region.

---

## Search: add ROTC programs field
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, feature

We should have a field to search by which ROTC programs a university has.

---

## Detail card: expanded result card shows no data
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

## Similar schools: very slow performance
- Priority: 2
- Labels: performance, bug

---

- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

After seeing results for "find similar schools" the user should have an appropriately titled button that allows them to expand the search via the main search page.

---

## Similar schools: loads on other cards without activation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

When clicking similar schools then viewing a different institution, the similar schools list loads on that card as well without showing the button or requiring a click. It should not be active until activated, but then stay active just for that school.

---

## Similar schools: no way to dismiss once visible
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

There's no way to get rid of similar schools once they've been made visible.

---

## Detail card: add next/previous result navigation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Each card should have navigation that allows going to the next or previous result (if available) without leaving the card view.

---

## Detail card: institution name shown twice at top
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

---

## Search: remove "graduate enrollment" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Graduate enrollment" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Search: rename "gender" facet to "coeducational enrollment" or similar
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The "gender" facet should be labeled "coeducational enrollment" or something like that.

---

## Search: remove "room and board" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Room and board" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Facets: consolidate description/citation tooltips
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet label has two tooltips next to it, one for a description and one for a citation. The description should be displayed when hovering over the label. The citation should be a tooltip but with a more informative icon than just the circle+i.

---

## Facets: remove NCES reference from tooltip descriptions
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Some of the facet field tooltip descriptions include something like (NCES: x_y_z). Remove that.

---

## Search: "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with
- Priority: 1
- Labels: search, bug

The "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with. It's non-functional.

---

## Facets: combine partisan direction and score into R-to-D color-coded slider
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Partisan direction" and "partisan score" should be combined into a single widget with a slider from R to D. Color coded red on R end and blue on D end. Two points on the slider for range top/bottom with default including the entire range.

---

## Search: expand application platforms to include UC, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, etc.
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data, enhancement

Application platforms should be more extensive and include the University of California application, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, and other similar state-specific shared application methods.

---

## Facets: clean up Koppen climate field labels and make multiselect
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All Koppen fields should be multiselect. They should not have "Koppen" in the labels (okay in tooltip). "Climate Group" label should just be "Climate," and the other two fields should not have "Subtype" in the label.

---

## Facets: enrollment/cost min-max should be dropdowns with increment steps
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

## Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

## Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

## Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

## Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

## Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

## Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

## Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

## Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

## PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

## PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

## csv export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the csv export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

## Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller changes:
- Rename `demo:test` to `demo:autopilot`
- Overlay shows play/pause, back, and forward controls in all modes
- In manual mode, add "Start Autopilot" button that continues from current step
- Going backward shows the previous step's state without full replay
- Each step gets a `setup()` function that can independently establish its precondition state (URL + key interactions), enabling non-sequential navigation
- Add deviation detection: before advancing, verify page state matches expectations; if not, show warning with option to re-run setup or continue anyway

---

## Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

---

## Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Mobile search window shows a white bar (content doesn't fill full width) during demo mobile steps. Not reproducible with manual browser resize — likely a Playwright `page.setViewportSize()` issue where the viewport doesn't trigger the same responsive behavior as a real mobile browser. Investigate whether the demo needs additional viewport setup (e.g., device emulation instead of raw viewport size) or if the app CSS has an edge case at exactly 375px.

---

## Demo: step 3/16 Add Filters fails on filter dropdown select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 3/16 (Add Filters) fails the "Filter dropdown" assertion with selector `select`. The `<select>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — it's the locale selector for City/Suburb/Town/Rural). Likely a timing or visibility issue — the filter sidebar may not be fully rendered or visible when `verify()` checks. Investigate whether the step's action needs to wait for filter panel to be visible before asserting.

---

## Demo: step 11/16 About Page fails on section heading h2
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 11/16 (About Page) fails the "Section heading" assertion with selector `h2`. The `<h2>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — "Our Mission" heading in a `<section>`). Likely a timing issue — the page may not be fully rendered when `verify()` runs. Investigate wait/timing in the step's action.

---

## Demo: manual mode exits after timeout when pausing interaction
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Manual mode exits after 30s because `waitForAdvance()` uses a hardcoded 30s timeout in `page.waitForFunction`. Fix:
- Manual mode should use `timeout: 0` (wait indefinitely)
- Switching from autopilot to manual should change timeout to 0
- Switching from manual to autopilot should set timeout to the autopilot default
- All timeout values should be named constants, not inline literals

---

## Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results

- Labels: map, enhancement

Redesign map as a toggle overlay that works with any result view (card/list/table):

**Layout:**
- Map sits above facets and search results, full width minus small padding
- Height is responsive to viewport by default — user should still see useful content below. User-resizable.
- Map toggle button is in the toolbar but visually offset from the card/list/table view switcher to make it clear it's a different kind of control

**Result/map interaction:**
- Hovering over a result highlights the corresponding pin (color change)
- Viewing an individual result card highlights the pin
- Hovering over a pin highlights the corresponding result in the card/list/table view below
- When hovering a pin, scroll the results to make the highlighted result visible (try this; may revert if UX feels wrong)

**Mobile (Airbnb-style):**
- Map stays visible at top even on mobile viewport
- Results are in a scrollable area below the map — scrolling results does not hide the map
- Clicking a result opens card view that fully covers the results list (but not the map)
- Active result highlighted on map via pin color

## Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"

content.text:
Removed. Now **issue 8 of 50** (renumbered):

---

**Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"**
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

> Demo search should be by something that matches multiple universities not just one ("Stanford").

Any preference for the replacement search term? Some options:
- "state" — broad, lots of results
- "technology" — matches MIT, Georgia Tech, Virginia Tech, etc.
- "art" — matches many art schools plus universities with "art" in the name
- Something else?

message.content: let's go with "technology" for now.  Also this makes me realize we want "tech" to match "technology" and vice versa--how can we handle that kind of expansion well?

content.thinking:
The user wants "tech" to match "technology" and vice versa. This is a search synonyms/query expansion question. Let me think about the options:

1. PostgreSQL full-text search already has some stemming via dictionaries, but "tech" → "technology" isn't a stemming relationship
2. PostgreSQL thesaurus dictionary - can define synonym mappings
3. Application-level query expansion - expand "tech" to "tech | technology" before sending to DB
4. pg_trgm (trigram matching) - would match partial strings but that's different
5. The current search uses `to_tsquery` - we could use prefix matching like `tech:*` which would match "technology"


6. Prefix matching with `tech:*` handles the forward direction but not the reverse, so I'd need synonym expansion for bidirectional matching. The real solution is probably combining prefix matching for abbreviations with a thesaurus dictionary or application-level synonym map for the reverse direction.

This feels like it deserves its own ticket since it's really a search quality improvement separate from the core demo functionality.

content.text:
Good catch — that's really a separate search engine issue. A few approaches:

1. **Prefix matching** (`tech:*` in tsquery) — handles tech→technology/technical/etc. but NOT technology→tech
2. **PostgreSQL synonym dictionary** — bidirectional, but requires DB-level config for each mapping
3. **Application-level synonym map** — maintain a map of common abbreviations/expansions (tech↔technology, CS↔computer science, etc.), expand queries before sending to the DB. Most flexible and testable.
4. **Combo: prefix matching + synonym map** — prefix handles the easy cases, synonym map handles the rest

I'd recommend option 4. Should I add this as a separate search issue?

For the demo issue itself:

> Change demo search term from "Stanford" to "technology" to demonstrate multi-result searches. Update all steps that reference the search term accordingly.

message.content: let's go with #3.  I think prefix matching will be too broad.

## Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

## Search: application-level synonym/abbreviation expansion
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Add an application-level synonym map for common search term expansions (e.g., tech↔technology, CS↔computer science, eng↔engineering). When a user searches, expand the query using the synonym map before sending to the database. This should be a maintainable data structure (not hardcoded in query logic) and covered by tests. Prefix matching (`tech:*`) was considered but rejected as too broad.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
## Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller changes:
- Rename `demo:test` to `demo:autopilot`
- Overlay shows play/pause, back, and forward controls in all modes
- In manual mode, add "Start Autopilot" button that continues from current step
- Going backward shows the previous step's state without full replay
- Each step gets a `setup()` function that can independently establish its precondition state (URL + key interactions), enabling non-sequential navigation
- Add deviation detection: before advancing, verify page state matches expectations; if not, show warning with option to re-run setup or continue anyway

---

## Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

---

## Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Mobile search window shows a white bar (content doesn't fill full width) during demo mobile steps. Not reproducible with manual browser resize — likely a Playwright `page.setViewportSize()` issue where the viewport doesn't trigger the same responsive behavior as a real mobile browser. Investigate whether the demo needs additional viewport setup (e.g., device emulation instead of raw viewport size) or if the app CSS has an edge case at exactly 375px.

---

## Demo: step 3/16 Add Filters fails on filter dropdown select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 3/16 (Add Filters) fails the "Filter dropdown" assertion with selector `select`. The `<select>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — it's the locale selector for City/Suburb/Town/Rural). Likely a timing or visibility issue — the filter sidebar may not be fully rendered or visible when `verify()` checks. Investigate whether the step's action needs to wait for filter panel to be visible before asserting.

---

## Demo: step 11/16 About Page fails on section heading h2
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 11/16 (About Page) fails the "Section heading" assertion with selector `h2`. The `<h2>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — "Our Mission" heading in a `<section>`). Likely a timing issue — the page may not be fully rendered when `verify()` runs. Investigate wait/timing in the step's action.

---

## Demo: manual mode exits after timeout when pausing interaction
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Manual mode exits after 30s because `waitForAdvance()` uses a hardcoded 30s timeout in `page.waitForFunction`. Fix:
- Manual mode should use `timeout: 0` (wait indefinitely)
- Switching from autopilot to manual should change timeout to 0
- Switching from manual to autopilot should set timeout to the autopilot default
- All timeout values should be named constants, not inline literals

---

## Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, enhancement

Redesign map as a toggle overlay that works with any result view (card/list/table):

**Layout:**
- Map sits above facets and search results, full width minus small padding
- Height is responsive to viewport by default — user should still see useful content below. User-resizable.
- Map toggle button is in the toolbar but visually offset from the card/list/table view switcher to make it clear it's a different kind of control

**Result/map interaction:**
- Hovering over a result highlights the corresponding pin (color change)
- Viewing an individual result card highlights the pin
- Hovering over a pin highlights the corresponding result in the card/list/table view below
- When hovering a pin, scroll the results to make the highlighted result visible (try this; may revert if UX feels wrong)

**Mobile (Airbnb-style):**
- Map stays visible at top even on mobile viewport
- Results are in a scrollable area below the map — scrolling results does not hide the map
- Clicking a result opens card view that fully covers the results list (but not the map)
- Active result highlighted on map via pin color

---

## Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo search should be by something that matches multiple universities not just one ("Stanford").

---

## Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford" (or whatever the search term is).

---

## Search button on homepage nearly invisible
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Search button on homepage is still nearly invisible (white text, gray background; black background on hover). Needs better contrast/visibility.

---

## Remove city from facet display
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove city from the facet display list.

---

## Remove latitude/longitude from facet list
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.

---

## Radius facet should be below location and conditional on location value
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.

---

## Carousel cards: right border on third card is cut off
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

Carousel cards' width leads to the right border on the third card being cut off in the default display.

---

## Free text field: connect via WebMCP to browser chat or built-in Claude API
- Priority: 3
- Labels: feature, ai

The free text field should connect via WebMCP to browser chat. If there's no browser chat, we should have a built-in Claude API integration that connects to the MCP server.

---

## List view: show more useful information (aim for 5 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The list view should have a few more useful pieces of information on it. Aim for 5 fields. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

## Card view: show more information (aim for 10 fields)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The default card view only shows the name and location. Need more — aim for about 10 useful pieces of information including the 5 from the list view. Need to propose candidates for user review.

---

## Search: default sort order needs design (distance if location available)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The search sorts alphabetically by default (example: searching "state"). If we have a location for the user, we should sort by distance. Default sort order needs design thinking.

---

## Search: region facet should be multi-select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Region" should be multi-select in the faceted search.

---

## Search: multiple-choice facets should be sorted alphabetically by default
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All search facets that are multiple choice should be sorted alphabetically by default. Currently "region" is not sorted alphabetically.

---

## Search: region should not include "US Service Schools"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data

"Region" should not include "US Service Schools" — that is not a geographical region.

---

## Search: add ROTC programs field
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, feature

We should have a field to search by which ROTC programs a university has.

---

## Detail card: expanded result card shows no data
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Clicking on a card in the card view pops up an expanded result card with no data in it. We want to show many more fields and have actual data in place.

---

## Similar schools: very slow performance
- Priority: 2
- Labels: performance, bug

"Find similar schools" is very slow.

---

## Similar schools: add button to expand search via main search page
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

After seeing results for "find similar schools" the user should have an appropriately titled button that allows them to expand the search via the main search page.

---

## Similar schools: loads on other cards without activation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

When clicking similar schools then viewing a different institution, the similar schools list loads on that card as well without showing the button or requiring a click. It should not be active until activated, but then stay active just for that school.

---

## Similar schools: no way to dismiss once visible
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

There's no way to get rid of similar schools once they've been made visible.

---

## Detail card: add next/previous result navigation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Each card should have navigation that allows going to the next or previous result (if available) without leaving the card view.

---

## Detail card: institution name shown twice at top
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

The card view shows the institution name twice at the top.

---

## Search: remove "graduate enrollment" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Graduate enrollment" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Search: rename "gender" facet to "coeducational enrollment" or similar
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The "gender" facet should be labeled "coeducational enrollment" or something like that.

---

## Search: remove "room and board" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Room and board" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Facets: consolidate description/citation tooltips
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet label has two tooltips next to it, one for a description and one for a citation. The description should be displayed when hovering over the label. The citation should be a tooltip but with a more informative icon than just the circle+i.

---

## Facets: remove NCES reference from tooltip descriptions
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Some of the facet field tooltip descriptions include something like (NCES: x_y_z). Remove that.

---

## Search: "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with
- Priority: 1
- Labels: search, bug

The "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with. It's non-functional.

---

## Facets: combine partisan direction and score into R-to-D color-coded slider
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Partisan direction" and "partisan score" should be combined into a single widget with a slider from R to D. Color coded red on R end and blue on D end. Two points on the slider for range top/bottom with default including the entire range.

---

## Search: expand application platforms to include UC, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, etc.
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data, enhancement

Application platforms should be more extensive and include the University of California application, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, and other similar state-specific shared application methods.

---

## Facets: clean up Koppen climate field labels and make multiselect
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All Koppen fields should be multiselect. They should not have "Koppen" in the labels (okay in tooltip). "Climate Group" label should just be "Climate," and the other two fields should not have "Subtype" in the label.

---

## Facets: enrollment/cost min-max should be dropdowns with increment steps
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

## Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

## Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

## Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

## Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

## Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

## Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

## Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

## Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

## PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

---

## PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

## csv export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the csv export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

content.text:
**Issue 9 of 51** (new count with the addition):

---

**Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing**
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

> Clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford" (or whatever the search term is).

This sounds like the typing animation hasn't finished when the user clicks "Next Step." The fix should be: don't allow advancing until the step's action (including typing) has fully completed. Does that match your expectation, or should advancing mid-type be allowed (and just skip to the end of the typed text)?

message.content: yes, prevent advancing

input.old_string: Clicking through initial manual step too fast results in incomplete typing of "Stanford" (or whatever the search term is).
input.new_string: Clicking "Next Step" before the current step's action completes (e.g., mid-typing of search term) causes incomplete state. Fix: disable the advance button until the step's `action()` promise has resolved. The overlay should not allow advancing until the step is fully complete.

content.content: The file /tmp/kapow-issues.md has been updated successfully.

Fix: disable the advance button until the step's `action()` promise has resolved. The overlay should not allow advancing until the step is fully complete.

- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

## Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

## Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

## Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

## Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

## Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

## Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

## Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

## Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

## PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

---

## PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

## csv export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the csv export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

3. Something else

## Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller changes:
- Rename `demo:test` to `demo:autopilot`
- Overlay shows play/pause, back, and forward controls in all modes
- In manual mode, add "Start Autopilot" button that continues from current step
- Going backward shows the previous step's state without full replay
- Each step gets a `setup()` function that can independently establish its precondition state (URL + key interactions), enabling non-sequential navigation
- Add deviation detection: before advancing, verify page state matches expectations; if not, show warning with option to re-run setup or continue anyway

---

## Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

---

## Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Mobile search window shows a white bar (content doesn't fill full width) during demo mobile steps. Not reproducible with manual browser resize — likely a Playwright `page.setViewportSize()` issue where the viewport doesn't trigger the same responsive behavior as a real mobile browser. Investigate whether the demo needs additional viewport setup (e.g., device emulation instead of raw viewport size) or if the app CSS has an edge case at exactly 375px.

---

## Demo: step 3/16 Add Filters fails on filter dropdown select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 3/16 (Add Filters) fails the "Filter dropdown" assertion with selector `select`. The `<select>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — it's the locale selector for City/Suburb/Town/Rural). Likely a timing or visibility issue — the filter sidebar may not be fully rendered or visible when `verify()` checks. Investigate whether the step's action needs to wait for filter panel to be visible before asserting.

---

## Demo: step 11/16 About Page fails on section heading h2
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 11/16 (About Page) fails the "Section heading" assertion with selector `h2`. The `<h2>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — "Our Mission" heading in a `<section>`). Likely a timing issue — the page may not be fully rendered when `verify()` runs. Investigate wait/timing in the step's action.

---

## Demo: manual mode exits after timeout when pausing interaction
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Manual mode exits after 30s because `waitForAdvance()` uses a hardcoded 30s timeout in `page.waitForFunction`. Fix:
- Manual mode should use `timeout: 0` (wait indefinitely)
- Switching from autopilot to manual should change timeout to 0
- Switching from manual to autopilot should set timeout to the autopilot default
- All timeout values should be named constants, not inline literals

---

## Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, enhancement

Redesign map as a toggle overlay that works with any result view (card/list/table):

**Layout:**
- Map sits above facets and search results, full width minus small padding
- Height is responsive to viewport by default — user should still see useful content below. User-resizable.
- Map toggle button is in the toolbar but visually offset from the card/list/table view switcher to make it clear it's a different kind of control

**Result/map interaction:**
- Hovering over a result highlights the corresponding pin (color change)
- Viewing an individual result card highlights the pin
- Hovering over a pin highlights the corresponding result in the card/list/table view below
- When hovering a pin, scroll the results to make the highlighted result visible (try this; may revert if UX feels wrong)

**Mobile (Airbnb-style):**
- Map stays visible at top even on mobile viewport
- Results are in a scrollable area below the map — scrolling results does not hide the map
- Clicking a result opens card view that fully covers the results list (but not the map)
- Active result highlighted on map via pin color

---

## Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Change demo search term from "Stanford" to "technology" to demonstrate multi-result searches. Update all steps that reference the search term accordingly.

---

## Search: application-level synonym/abbreviation expansion
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Add an application-level synonym map for common search term expansions (e.g., tech↔technology, CS↔computer science, eng↔engineering). When a user searches, expand the query using the synonym map before sending to the database. This should be a maintainable data structure (not hardcoded in query logic) and covered by tests. Prefix matching (`tech:*`) was considered but rejected as too broad.

---

## Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Clicking "Next Step" before the current step's action completes (e.g., mid-typing of search term) causes incomplete state. Fix: disable the advance button until the step's `action()` promise has resolved. The overlay should not allow advancing until the step is fully complete.

- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data

"Region" should not include "US Service Schools" — that is not a geographical region.

---

## Search: add ROTC programs field
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, feature

We should have a field to search by which ROTC programs a university has.

---

## Detail card: expanded result card shows no data
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Clicking on a card in the card view pops up an expanded result card with no data in it. We want to show many more fields and have actual data in place.

---

## Similar schools: very slow performance
- Priority: 2
- Labels: performance, bug

"Find similar schools" is very slow.

---

## Similar schools: add button to expand search via main search page
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

After seeing results for "find similar schools" the user should have an appropriately titled button that allows them to expand the search via the main search page.

---

## Similar schools: loads on other cards without activation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

When clicking similar schools then viewing a different institution, the similar schools list loads on that card as well without showing the button or requiring a click. It should not be active until activated, but then stay active just for that school.

---

## Similar schools: no way to dismiss once visible
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

There's no way to get rid of similar schools once they've been made visible.

---

## Detail card: add next/previous result navigation
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Each card should have navigation that allows going to the next or previous result (if available) without leaving the card view.

---

## Detail card: institution name shown twice at top
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

The card view shows the institution name twice at the top.

---

## Search: remove "graduate enrollment" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Graduate enrollment" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Search: rename "gender" facet to "coeducational enrollment" or similar
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

The "gender" facet should be labeled "coeducational enrollment" or something like that.

---

## Search: remove "room and board" facet
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

"Room and board" shouldn't be a searchable facet. Remove it.

---

## Facets: consolidate description/citation tooltips
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet label has two tooltips next to it, one for a description and one for a citation. The description should be displayed when hovering over the label. The citation should be a tooltip but with a more informative icon than just the circle+i.

---

## Facets: remove NCES reference from tooltip descriptions
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Some of the facet field tooltip descriptions include something like (NCES: x_y_z). Remove that.

---

## Search: "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with
- Priority: 1
- Labels: search, bug

The "fields of study" facet has nothing to interact with. It's non-functional.

---

## Facets: combine partisan direction and score into R-to-D color-coded slider
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Partisan direction" and "partisan score" should be combined into a single widget with a slider from R to D. Color coded red on R end and blue on D end. Two points on the slider for range top/bottom with default including the entire range.

---

## Search: expand application platforms to include UC, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, etc.
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, data, enhancement

Application platforms should be more extensive and include the University of California application, ApplyTexas, ApplySUNY, and other similar state-specific shared application methods.

---

## Facets: clean up Koppen climate field labels and make multiselect
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

All Koppen fields should be multiselect. They should not have "Koppen" in the labels (okay in tooltip). "Climate Group" label should just be "Climate," and the other two fields should not have "Subtype" in the label.

---

## Facets: enrollment/cost min-max should be dropdowns with increment steps
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

"Total enrollment" min/max should be dropdowns rather than text fields. Allowed values: 1000 increments from 0 to 10,000 then 2500 increments above that, with "unlimited" at the high end. Apply the same to cost fields.

---

## Facets: move custom rankings blend widget to rankings group
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The "custom rankings blend" widget should be with the rankings facet group.

---

## Facets: make every facet group collapsible with active indicator
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every facet group should be collapsible. If a facet within the group is active, the collapsed group should not completely disappear but have a small indicator of what is active.

---

## Search: show active filter pills at top of results with dismiss button
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

Every active search filter should have a pill at the top of the search results that can be X-ed out to turn off that filter.

---

## Custom ranking blend: summary display with modal editor
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The custom ranking blend should not be editable directly on the search page; it should just be a summary display (with no summary if there isn't a custom ranking blend). The user should have an edit button/link to modify it that spawns a separate modal widget where they can edit the blend. This does not modify search results until the user indicates completion.

---

## Search: add sort options for list and card view
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

We need sort options on the list and card view. That needs a design.

---

## Table view: show many more columns by default with horizontal scroll
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, enhancement

The table view needs to show many more columns by default. A horizontal scroll bar is acceptable.

---

## Table view: institution type shows as number instead of descriptive word
- Priority: 2
- Labels: ui, bug

In the table view, "institution type" shows up as a number. It should be the descriptive word.

---

## Data: filter out non-real institution locations (e.g. ASU-Pima transfer paths)
- Priority: 2
- Labels: data, bug

Many institutions don't have a total enrollment number e.g. Arizona State University - Pima. That appears not to be a real location but rather a transfer path from Pima Community College to ASU. These should not be shown. Probably marked as a community college; we don't want to show those. Needs investigation.

---

## PDF export: terrible formatting with squeezed columns and ugly colors
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The PDF export has all columns squeezed so narrow that text is stretched out vertically and unreadable. Also has white text on dark blue background that is ugly. If there are many columns, should split horizontally across successive pages; leftmost two columns should always be institution name and location.

---

## PDF export: Koppen temperature subtype shows letter code instead of label
- Priority: 2
- Labels: export, bug

The "Koppen temperature subtype" in the PDF export seems to be a letter code rather than a useful label.

---

## csv export: clicking export gives "missing or malformed authorization header"
- Priority: 1
- Labels: export, bug

Clicking the csv export just gives "missing or malformed authorization header" error. Export should work without authentication or handle auth properly.

**Issue 12 of 51:**

**Remove latitude/longitude from facet list**
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

> Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.

Same treatment — hide from facet sidebar, keep in API?

message.content: yes, although in the API search, lat/long should only be allowed in conjunction with an explicit distance parameter.  we're not going to try to do an exact match lat/long search.

input.old_string: Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.
input.new_string: Hide latitude/longitude from the facet sidebar in the frontend. Keep in the API, but lat/long should only be accepted in conjunction with an explicit distance/radius parameter — reject bare lat/long queries (no exact-match geo search).

## Demo: rename demo:test to demo:autopilot and add pause/backward/autopilot controls
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Demo controller changes:
- Rename `demo:test` to `demo:autopilot`
- Overlay shows play/pause, back, and forward controls in all modes
- In manual mode, add "Start Autopilot" button that continues from current step
- Going backward shows the previous step's state without full replay
- Each step gets a `setup()` function that can independently establish its precondition state (URL + key interactions), enabling non-sequential navigation
- Add deviation detection: before advancing, verify page state matches expectations; if not, show warning with option to re-run setup or continue anyway

---

## Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

---

## Demo: mobile search window width doesn't match content width
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Mobile search window shows a white bar (content doesn't fill full width) during demo mobile steps. Not reproducible with manual browser resize — likely a Playwright `page.setViewportSize()` issue where the viewport doesn't trigger the same responsive behavior as a real mobile browser. Investigate whether the demo needs additional viewport setup (e.g., device emulation instead of raw viewport size) or if the app CSS has an edge case at exactly 375px.

---

## Demo: step 3/16 Add Filters fails on filter dropdown select
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 3/16 (Add Filters) fails the "Filter dropdown" assertion with selector `select`. The `<select>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — it's the locale selector for City/Suburb/Town/Rural). Likely a timing or visibility issue — the filter sidebar may not be fully rendered or visible when `verify()` checks. Investigate whether the step's action needs to wait for filter panel to be visible before asserting.

---

## Demo: step 11/16 About Page fails on section heading h2
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Step 11/16 (About Page) fails the "Section heading" assertion with selector `h2`. The `<h2>` element exists in the DOM (confirmed manually — "Our Mission" heading in a `<section>`). Likely a timing issue — the page may not be fully rendered when `verify()` runs. Investigate wait/timing in the step's action.

---

## Demo: manual mode exits after timeout when pausing interaction
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Manual mode exits after 30s because `waitForAdvance()` uses a hardcoded 30s timeout in `page.waitForFunction`. Fix:
- Manual mode should use `timeout: 0` (wait indefinitely)
- Switching from autopilot to manual should change timeout to 0
- Switching from manual to autopilot should set timeout to the autopilot default
- All timeout values should be named constants, not inline literals

---

## Map view: should be wider, toggled on any view, positioned above facets/results
- Priority: 2
- Labels: map, enhancement

Redesign map as a toggle overlay that works with any result view (card/list/table):

**Layout:**
- Map sits above facets and search results, full width minus small padding
- Height is responsive to viewport by default — user should still see useful content below. User-resizable.
- Map toggle button is in the toolbar but visually offset from the card/list/table view switcher to make it clear it's a different kind of control

**Result/map interaction:**
- Hovering over a result highlights the corresponding pin (color change)
- Viewing an individual result card highlights the pin
- Hovering over a pin highlights the corresponding result in the card/list/table view below
- When hovering a pin, scroll the results to make the highlighted result visible (try this; may revert if UX feels wrong)

**Mobile (Airbnb-style):**
- Map stays visible at top even on mobile viewport
- Results are in a scrollable area below the map — scrolling results does not hide the map
- Clicking a result opens card view that fully covers the results list (but not the map)
- Active result highlighted on map via pin color

---

## Demo: search term should match multiple universities, not just "Stanford"
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, enhancement

Change demo search term from "Stanford" to "technology" to demonstrate multi-result searches. Update all steps that reference the search term accordingly.

---

## Search: application-level synonym/abbreviation expansion
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

Add an application-level synonym map for common search term expansions (e.g., tech↔technology, CS↔computer science, eng↔engineering). When a user searches, expand the query using the synonym map before sending to the database. This should be a maintainable data structure (not hardcoded in query logic) and covered by tests. Prefix matching (`tech:*`) was considered but rejected as too broad.

---

## Demo: clicking through initial manual step too fast causes incomplete typing
- Priority: 2
- Labels: demo, bug

Clicking "Next Step" before the current step's action completes (e.g., mid-typing of search term) causes incomplete state. Fix: disable the advance button until the step's `action()` promise has resolved. The overlay should not allow advancing until the step is fully complete.

---

## Search button on homepage nearly invisible
- Priority: 1
- Labels: ui, bug

Search button on homepage is nearly invisible (white text, gray background; black background on hover).

Fix: use brand primary (dark blue `brand.9`) with white text for the search button. Additionally, establish a consistent primary/secondary button design system using Mantine's variant/color props:
- **Primary buttons**: `variant="filled" color="brand"` (dark blue bg, white text)
- **Secondary buttons**: `variant="outline" color="brand"` or `variant="light" color="brand"`
- Apply this standard to all buttons throughout the app, not just the homepage search button

---

- Priority: 2

Hide city from the facet sidebar in the frontend. Keep it searchable via the API (do not remove from the search field registry).

Remove latitude/longitude from the facet list.

**Issue 13 of 51:**

---

**Radius facet should be below location and conditional on location value**
- Priority: 2
- Labels: search, enhancement

> Radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.

This pairs nicely with the lat/long issue above. Should the radius have a default value when location is provided (e.g., 50 miles)? And should it be a dropdown with preset options (10, 25, 50, 100, 250 miles) or a free-text entry?

message.content: yes, default, yes dropdown with presets for now.

content.text: What default distance? 50 miles?

message.content: yes

input.old_string: Radius facet entry should be right below zip code/browser location, and it should only be available if there is a value provided for location.
input.new_string: Radius facet should be positioned directly below zip code/browser location in the facet sidebar. Only visible/enabled when a location value is provided. Dropdown with preset options (10, 25, 50, 100, 250 miles). Default to 50 miles when location is set.
